forum.empty_state: No blog posts here yet. Make sure (1) the tag slugs configured in admin match real tags on your forum (lowercase, look at the slug column in Admin → Tags), and (2) at least one discussion exists in one of those tags.
forum.not_found: We could not find that post.
forum.no_comments: No comments yet. Be the first to share your thoughts.
forum.login_to_comment: Log in to leave a comment

settings.tag_slugs_help: One or more tag slugs, one per line or comma-separated. Discussions tagged with any of these are treated as blog posts. Each tag must already exist in your forum's tag list. For example, leave it as `blog` for a single category, or set `news\ntutorials\nopinion` for multiple sections.
settings.title_help: Shown in the hero at the top of the blog index. Leave blank to fall back to your forum title.
settings.tagline_help: Optional one-line description shown under the blog title.
settings.show_featured_help: When enabled, the newest blog post is displayed in a larger featured card at the top of the index.
settings.nav_label_help: The label for the blog link in the forum navigation. Leave blank to use the default ("Blog").
settings.nav_icon_help: Font Awesome class for the blog link's icon (e.g. fas fa-feather-alt, fas fa-book, fas fa-newspaper, fas fa-pencil-alt). Leave blank to use the default.
settings.header_mode_help: Choose what appears at the top of the blog index. Logo uses your forum's site logo (configured under Admin → Appearance). Custom lets you specify your own image URL below.
settings.custom_logo_url_help: Used only when "Hero header style" is set to Custom. Accepts any image URL. Leave blank to fall back to text.
settings.homepage_pointer_help: To make the blog (or any other page) the default landing page visitors see, use Flarum's standard Home Page picker on the Basics admin page.
